title: Combined vector operations
description: Use scalar multiplication and addition or subtraction of vectors to create a new vector.
topic_path: Topic D: Lesson 19: Directed line segments and vectors

assessment_items.question_content:
$\vec u = (-1,-7)$

$\vec w = (3, 1)$

$2\vec u + (-3)\vec w= (~ $[[☃ numeric-input 1]] , [[☃ numeric-input 2]] $~)$
hints:
### Strategy overview

This question asks us to perform the following: 


1. Scalar multiplication $~~~$  [[☃ explanation 1]]

2. Vector addition $~~~$ [[☃ explanation 2]]
